hero.title: Expense Tracker
hero.description: Record everyday spending, organize expenses, and understand what was spent.

differences.title: Focused spending awareness
differences.description: A practical tracker for what was spent without expanding into budgeting or forecasting.

items.title: Fast capture
items.description: Record amount, date, payment method, merchant, and notes while details are fresh.

items.title: Useful categories
items.description: Group expenses in categories that match the user's routine.

items.title: Readable summaries
items.description: Review totals, highest expense, recent expenses, and category totals in one place.

feel.title: Simple enough for every day
feel.description: The workflow stays focused on recording and understanding expenses.

items.title: Capture quickly
items.description: Add the essential spending details in a short form.

items.title: Stay organized
items.description: Use categories and filters to keep records readable.

items.title: Review clearly
items.description: Use history and insights to understand current spending records.

audiences.title: Who uses Expense Tracker
audiences.description: Useful for anyone who wants a clear record of personal or household spending.

items.title: Individuals
items.description: Track everyday purchases and recurring costs.

items.title: Students
items.description: Keep limited spending records organized by category.

items.title: Households
items.description: Review shared spending patterns through simple records.

resourceSection.title: Supports better review
resourceSection.description: Keep spending records ready for future planning without turning this app into a budget planner.

items.title: Expense records
items.description: Create, edit, duplicate, delete, search, and filter expenses.

items.title: Category management
items.description: Create and maintain categories for recurring spending areas.

items.title: History and insights
items.description: Review lifecycle events and local summaries from recorded expenses.

groupedSection.title: Common expense groups
groupedSection.description: Start with familiar categories and adapt them to the user's routine.

items.name: Transport
items.description: Commutes, fuel, taxis, and local travel.

technicalSection.title: Built for reusable records
technicalSection.description: Expense Tracker follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.
items: Owner-scoped Expense Tracker API and isolated database tables.
Protected Expenses, Categories, History, and Insights workflow routes.
Lightweight dashboard responses with detail endpoints for editing.

finalCta.title: Ready to understand your spending?
finalCta.description: Open Expense Tracker and start with the next expense.
